resources.desc: Volunteer group for various events, such as soccer games, tutoring, supervising school dances, etc.

Flea market open from jun-october on weekends and certain weekdays
Local farmers able to sell fresh produce here
JBJ Soul Kitchen is a non-profit Community Restaurant established by the Jon Bon Jovi Soul Foundation, serving paying customers and those in-need.

Monmouth non-profit group that connects volunteers with various charities, as well as planning their own fundraisers
Funds go to various local charities (ex. Cure Kids Cancer, Cole Porter Foundation, Food Bank of Monmouth and Ocean Counties, and more)

The Friendship Circle of Central Jersey was founded with the goal of promoting a greater awareness and understanding of both the unique needs and the unique gifts of people with special needs, and encourages respect and empathy for those facing challenges.
